conversations.say: Mira, let's finalize our joint acknowledgment of the off-calendar meeting records so neither of us is left holding sole liability.
conversations.offer: Coordinated public framing protecting both City Hall and Parallax from unfounded conspiracy claims.
conversations.request: Mutual agreement on our matching records disclosure.

conversations.say: Maren, City Hall is locking in the binding worker safeguard frameworks and funding deadlines we negotiated.
conversations.offer: Formal administrative backing and direct agency enforcement of labor safeguards.
conversations.request: Continued coalition support and partnership as we release the final policy commitments tonight.

conversations.say: Inez, your neighborhood demands are backed by City Hall resources and concrete funding deadlines starting tonight.
conversations.offer: Enforceable community funding commitments and permanent neighborhood representation.
conversations.request: Solidarity in separating verified civic needs from market panic.

public_statement: City Hall is delivering enforceable worker safeguards and permanent neighborhood funding commitments tonight, separating verified civic needs from market panic and unverified rumors.

commitments.promise: Establish a binding deadline and enforceable worker safeguards for city-partnered deployments.

goal_progress: Finalized off-calendar meeting alignment and shared responsibility with Mira Sen.
Secured worker safeguard commitments and deadlines with Maren Okafor.
Established concrete neighborhood funding commitments with Inez Baptiste.
reasoning_summary: Celeste completes her municipal coalitions, locking in enforceable worker and neighborhood safeguards while aligning disclosure terms with Mira to ensure policy survives the mystery.
